The Format+ synchro-tilter adjusts tilt tension automatically to your body weight — no manual knob, no trial and error.

The Format+ is a high-back all-mesh synchro-tilter from Global Furniture Group built for users who want the ergonomic depth of a premium chair without fussing with manual tension controls. The weight-sensing mechanism calibrates the tilt to you automatically, while side-activated sliding seat depth, ratchet back height adjustment, and 4D T-arms (height, width, slide, and rotation) let you dial every other dimension manually. Breathable mesh seat and back keep airflow consistent through a full workday. GREENGUARD Gold certified, Canadian-made, and backed by a lifetime warranty.

  • Ratchet back height adjustment
  • Side-activated sliding seat depth adjustment

  • All-mesh seat and back — Black only · breathable through a full shift
